title: Campervan vs Rental Car for NZ Family Road Trips — The Real Comparison
meta_desc: Compare campervan and rental car costs for NZ family road trips, including flexibility and what you give up with each option
intro: When planning a family road trip in New Zealand, one of the biggest decisions is whether to rent a campervan or a car. With a 10-day trip costing around $2,500-$4,000, it's essential to choose the right option. We compared the two to help you make an informed decision.

sections.heading: Flexibility and Freedom
sections.body: One of the biggest advantages of renting a campervan is the flexibility to stop and sleep wherever you want, as long as it's allowed. With a rental car, you'll need to book accommodation in advance, which can be restrictive. However, rental cars often come with unlimited mileage, whereas campervans may have mileage limits.

sections.heading: What You Give Up with Each Option
list: With a campervan, you give up the freedom to explore cities and towns without worrying about parking and camping restrictions.
With a rental car, you give up the convenience of having your accommodation and vehicle in one, and may need to pack and unpack every day.

sections.heading: Real-World Example: Auckland to Rotorua
sections.body: Let's say you're planning a 4-day trip from Auckland to Rotorua. With a campervan, you can drive the 3-hour journey and stop at the scenic spots along the way, such as the Waitomo Glowworm Caves. With a rental car, you'll need to book accommodation in Rotorua and drive back to your hotel each night.

sections.heading: Popular Campervan and Rental Car Options
list: Avis Rental Cars: from $40 per day
Hertz Rental Cars: from $50 per day

sections.heading: Get the Best Deal for Your Family

cta.text: Use our NZ Family Travel Budget Calculator to plan your trip

sections.heading: Explore NZ's Top Destinations
sections.body: Once you've decided on your transport option, it's time to start planning your itinerary. Check out our destination guides for inspiration, from the beautiful beaches of the Bay of Islands to the stunning fjords of Milford Sound.
